title: OpenCode Desktop App — Comprehensive Surface Map

repository_layout.summary: Bun monorepo with ~25 packages. Desktop app lives in packages/desktop. Engine lives in packages/opencode. UI framework in packages/app (SolidJS).

packages.name: packages/desktop
packages.role: Electron desktop shell — main process, preload, renderer bootstrap

packages.name: packages/opencode
packages.role: CLI/HTTP server engine — runs as sidecar inside desktop

packages.name: packages/app
packages.role: SolidJS UI app — shared between desktop renderer and web

packages.name: packages/core
packages.role: Core library — Effect services, Global paths, logging, flags

packages.name: packages/desktop/electron.vite.config.ts
packages.role: Build config for main, preload, renderer via electron-vite

repository_layout.workspace_config: Root package.json at /Users/user/Developer/GitHub/opencode-desktop-dev/package.json — uses bun workspaces with catalog: dependencies. Package manager: bun@1.3.14.

electron_main.exports: None (runs as entry point, calls Effect.runFork(main) at bottom)
lifecycle: Module-level: creates paths singleton, runs migration
→ setInitStep → createLoadingWindow → try port → spawn sidecar → handle migration → open main window → close loading window
Event listeners: open-url (deep links), before-quit, will-quit, child-process-gone, render-process-gone

electron_sidecar.purpose: Runs the opencode server engine (imports virtual:opencode-server), performs SQLite JSON migrations, starts HTTP listener
electron_sidecar.key_function: start(command) - prepares env, imports virtual module, runs JSON migrations, calls Server.listen()
electron_sidecar.messaging: parentPort.on('message') receives StartCommand/StopCommand, sends SidecarMessage (sqlite progress, ready, error, stopped)

notable: Uses typedInvoke/typedSend/safeInvoke from ipc-contract.ts for type-safe IPC
Exposes window.api with methods covering: init, store, filesystem, window, zoom, updates, plugins, GitHub auth, config

build_entries.electron.vite.config.ts: Two main bundles: src/main/index.ts (main process) + src/main/sidecar.ts (sidecar worker). Preload: src/preload/index.ts. Renderer: src/renderer/index.html + loading.html
virtual_modules: opencode:node-pty-narrower resolves @lydell/node-pty to platform-specific native pkg

native_addons.@lydell/node-pty: Platform-specific (darwin-arm64, darwin-x64, linux-arm64, linux-x64, win32-arm64, win32-x64) — resolved via electron.vite.config.ts plugin
native_addons.native/: Referenced in electron-builder extraResources but directory does NOT exist at packages/desktop/native/ — possibly build artifact or dead config

ipc_contract.purpose: Single source of truth for all IPC channel signatures — IpcHandleContract (params+returns), IpcSendContract
ipc_contract.compile_time_check: _channelCoverage: _CoverageOk ensures every IPC.handle and IPC.send key has a contract entry

handler_modules.name: init
handler_modules.handles: KILL_SIDECAR, AWAIT_INITIALIZATION, GET_WINDOW_CONFIG, CONSUME_INITIAL_DEEP_LINKS, GET_DEFAULT_SERVER_URL, etc.

handler_modules.name: store
handler_modules.handles: STORE_GET, STORE_SET, STORE_DELETE, STORE_CLEAR, STORE_KEYS, STORE_LENGTH

handler_modules.name: fs
handler_modules.handles: OPEN_DIRECTORY_PICKER, OPEN_FILE_PICKER, SAVE_FILE_PICKER, OPEN_LINK, OPEN_PATH, READ_CLIPBOARD_IMAGE, SHOW_NOTIFICATION

handler_modules.name: config
handler_modules.handles: GET/SET/DELETE custom agents, MCP servers, plugin config

handler_modules.name: window
handler_modules.handles: window management, zoom, titlebar, background color

handler_modules.name: github
handler_modules.handles: GITHUB_OAUTH_START, GITHUB_OAUTH_CALLBACK, GITHUB_GET_TOKEN, GITHUB_SET_TOKEN, GITHUB_CLEAR_TOKEN, GITHUB_API_PROXY

push_channels.MENU_COMMAND: opencode:menu-command — forwarded menu actions to renderer

primary_db.adapter_layer: packages/opencode/src/storage/adapter.ts — DatabaseAdapter.Service (Effect Context.Service), makePgAdapter(), makeSQLiteAdapter(), makeDuckDBAdapter(), defaultLayer switches on DatabaseConfig

pglite_usage.migration: db.pg.ts:57 — manual migration execution via readMigrationFiles + client.exec()

node_postgres_usage.creation: db.pg.ts:37 — new Pool({ connectionString, ssl, max, min, connectionTimeoutMillis, idleTimeoutMillis })

priority: Flag.OPENCODE_DB (':memory:' or absolute or relative to data dir)

duckdb.role: Analytical queries, separate from primary transactional DB

sqlite_legacy.role: Older JSON-based migration system referenced in sidecar.ts — runs via JsonMigration.run(drizzle(...)) before the server starts
sqlite_legacy.migration_folder: packages/opencode/migration/ (20 migrations — larger than pg migration set)

global_paths.created_at_startup: fs.mkdir for all 7 dirs at module init

desktop_storage.electron_user_data: app.getPath('userData') — set via app.setPath before store init
desktop_storage.electron_store: packages/desktop/src/main/store.ts — uses electron-store with cwd: app.getPath('userData')
desktop_storage.xbps: electron-store files stored as plain files (fileExtension: '')
desktop_storage.migration: packages/desktop/src/main/migrate.ts — migrates from Tauri-based paths (ai.opencode.desktop.tro). Reads old electron-store files and copies settings.
desktop_storage.sidecar_env: sidecar.ts:prepareSidecarEnv() sets XDG_STATE_HOME to app.getPath('userData'), OPENCODE_SERVER_USERNAME/PASSWORD

list.name: duckdb
list.role: Native DuckDB bindings for analytics queries

list.name: mac_window.node
list.role: Custom native module (referenced in extraResources but directory missing)

list.name: swift-build/**
list.role: Swift native code (referenced in extraResources but directory missing)

native_addons.native_dir: packages/desktop/native/ — does NOT exist in working tree (referenced in electron-builder extraResources but no directory or files found)

plugin_system.renderer_loader: packages/desktop/src/renderer/plugin-loader.ts (DesktopPluginLoader class — dynamic imports, slot registration, lifecycle management)
plugin_system.renderer_transport: packages/desktop/src/renderer/plugin-transport.ts (ElectronPluginTransport wraps preload bridge with namespace isolation)

custom_agents.config_type: AgentDef (id, name, prompt, description, model, variant, temperature, top_p, color, steps)

capabilities.gated_via: DesktopCapabilities (hardcoded: github, plugins, mcp, shellOpen, clipboardImage, notifications all true)

server_health_endpoint.handler: Effect.fn('GlobalHttpApi.health')(function* () { return { healthy: true as const, version: InstallationVersion } })
server_health_endpoint.status: Always returns { healthy: true, version: 'x.y.z' } — no actual health checks performed

server_heartbeat.type: SSE event stream — Stream.tick('10 seconds') emitting server.heartbeat events
server_heartbeat.purpose: Keeps SSE connection alive, used by renderer to detect disconnection

renderer_unresponsive_sampler.behavior: Collects JS call stacks via win.webContents.mainFrame.collectJavaScriptCallStack(), deduplicates with frequency counts, logs aggregated report

crash_reporter.config: app.setPath('crashDumps', ...), requires environment variable or config

fatal_renderer_error.data: FatalRendererError { error, url, version, platform, os }

export_debug_logs.behavior: Zips log files, returns path to exported archive

logging.net_log: startNetLog() enables capture of network traffic via netLog

window_recovery.recovery: Shows modal dialog with Relaunch/Export Logs/Quit options

macos_entitlements.assessment: All JIT and library validation exceptions enabled — necessary for Node.js/V8 but weakens security posture

sandbox.renderer: sandbox: true, contextIsolation: true, nodeIntegration: false in all windows

extra_resources: native/swift-build/** — BUT native/ directory does NOT exist currently

main_process_startup: 1. Module init: Global.Path directories created, migration runs (packages/core/src/global.ts, packages/desktop/src/main/migrate.ts)
4. app.setPath('userData', ...) — ensures electron-store writes to correct channel-specific directory
7. Find available port via createServer().listen(0) on loopback
8. Start sidecar worker: spawn sidecar via Effect.promise → passes hostname, port, password, userDataPath, needsMigration
9. Sidecar starts: imports virtual:opencode-server, runs JSON migrations (if needed), starts Server.listen()
10. Wait for sidecar health check (30s timeout)
13. Renderer sends AWAIT_INITIALIZATION → gets ServerReadyData (url, username, password)
renderer_mount: AppBaseProviders: ThemeProvider, QueryClientProvider, Router (MemoryRouter), I18nProvider, DialogProvider, ...
AppInterface: Root shell with ConnectionGate that connects to the sidecar HTTP server

existing_findings.summary: applyMigrations defined at db.pg.ts:25 but never called anywhere in runtime
migration-pg/ has 1 migration vs migration/ has 20 — massive gap
Misleading variable name 'electronWindows' in titlebar.tsx — no Electron runtime; Tauri is the desktop runtime
Two tools in registry are placeholders (delegate.ts, session-diff.ts)
ToolCache.getOrCompute is defined but never called
ToolCache.inflight map mutated via direct reference mutation bypassing Ref.update

smoking_guns_for_health_diagnostics.item: Health endpoint is a stub — always returns {healthy: true} with no actual DB connectivity check, sidecar process check, port check, or migration status check. NOT suitable for real monitoring.
native/ directory referenced in electron-builder extraResources does NOT exist — mac_window.node and swift-build files cannot be bundled.
DesktopCapabilities is hardcoded to all-true — no platform-aware feature detection.
Postgres migration gap: 1 migration in migration-pg/ vs 20 in migration/ — applyMigrations never called in runtime (only old JSON migrations run on startup).
Sidecar runs as worker thread via process.parentPort — if it crashes, no automatic restart mechanism (only before-quit/will-quit handlers attempt killSidecar).
Unresponsive sampler collects JS call stacks for 15s and logs them — useful but results not surfaced to user or any diagnostics UI.
electron-store files use empty fileExtension — files are named by store name without extension, which could conflict.
